**天真爛漫な華は、付き合っている彼氏の祖父老人とも仲良し。その上、老人の介護も嫌な顔もせず引き受ける優しい娘。そんな健気な姿に心を打たれ、老人は着物職人だった技術を活かし、華の為に浴衣を仕立てることを思い立つ。だが、いざ採寸となったその時、華は老人の前で恥ずかしげもなく脱衣！突如現れた華の色白の若い肌に刺激を受けた老人のち○ぽは、若かりし頃のように雄々しく隆起する。そして老人の華への想いは募っていき…。数日後、紆余曲折を経て完成した浴衣を纏い、華は老人の前に立つ。老人の想いに応える為に…。はるかな年の差を超えて交わる若ま○こと老ち○ぽ。愛ある性介護の果てに繰り広げられる、相思相愛の生姦交尾！＃班長P シリーズ中でも屈指の年の差SEX！人妻姦、嫁寝取りだけではない禁断介護の新境地展開。もちろん山田翁定番の貪り咀嚼、しつこいベロキス、ねっとり女体舐めも健在。 対する華嬢もリアル感重視で笑顔多めの介護、山田翁のお株を奪う老体舐め、白肌を紅く染める本気交尾で対抗。今作はいつにもまして濃厚ラブラブ！**

**Hana is an innocent girl who is good friends with her boyfriend's elderly grandfather. She is also a kind and gentle girl who takes care of the old man without showing any displeasure. The old man is so moved by Hana's kindness that he decides to tailor a yukata for her, taking advantage of his skills as a kimono maker. However, when it comes time to take her measurements, Hana shamelessly undresses in front of the old man! The old man's penis, stimulated by Hana's young, fair skin, rises up as it did when he was young. And the old man's feelings for Hana grow... title: A Kite (1998) [mehsubs] [Dual Audio] [DVDRip] [SD 480p]
description:
http://anidb.net/a314

Synopsis
Sawa is a school girl, an orphan, and an assassin. She is being controlled by a corrupt cop who gives her targets to kill, detailing to her the crimes these men have committed in order to justify their death. Some of his power over Sawa has to do with her deceased parents and the promise of revenge. When another orphan, a teenage boy called Oburi, is brought in to assist Sawa, the two teenage killers form a bond of sorts. As they heal each other's emotional wounds, they begin to dream of a life that would not be spent under the shadows of murder.

Uploader’s Notes: It’s mehsubs because you know… meh. Encoded it from the R1 Mediacoder dvd with Mezzo Forte aka the true uncensored pack dvd’s with MakeMKV because im a hack and can’t properly encode things without a GUI that thinks for me :). It’s at the original bitcode most likely. Added CRC32.

title: Cosplay Photo Library V3 part 1 (A-B)
description:
This library is made by an anon on 4chan’s t board (not me).
17MB torrent file.... Takes awhile to load.

56 cosplayers (A-B), 3112 sets, 177752 images
Some random pictures of the whole set: https://varishangout.net/users/cosplaybot

Differences with V2
Most of the processes and scripts i use kept improving during the development of V2 so the newer parts were a lot more polished than the older ones, in addition to that a lot of sets had two or even three versions in different image quality, V3 should be a lot more consistant with its polish and at this point i think i have the best quality images i'll be able to get so hopefully there won't be as many duplicate sets
